chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. Criminal Misc. Application No.102 of 2023 (Abdul Rahman vs. The State) Date Order with signature of Judge Priority For hearing of main case 08.11.2024. Mr. Imtiaz Ali, advocate for the applicant Ms. Rubina Qadir, DPG O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Learned counsel for the applicant has challenged an order dated 04.02.2023 passed by learned V-Additional Sessions Judge Karachi Malir directing the SHO to conduct inquiry and record statement of respondent No.4 and if any cognizable offence is made out, register the FIR. 2. Learned counsel for the applicant submits that parties are brothers inter se and in the pending inquiry the respondent No.4 is not appearing. 3. Learned Deputy Prosecutor General (DPG) submits that directions may be issued to the SHO not to register the FIR until inquiry is made and applicant is identified to have committed any offence of cognizable nature. Order accordingly. This criminal miscellaneous application stands disposed of in above terms. J U D G E Rafiq/P.A
